question: 哪些属于“氢燃料电池“领域但没有任何法律状态记录的专利？给我列出申请号和标题。
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(:TechDomain {name:'氢燃料电池'})
WHERE NOT EXISTS { MATCH (p)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(:LegalStatus) }
RETURN p.title AS title, p.application_no AS application_no, p.application_date AS application_date
ORDER BY p.application_date DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 能否找出从未被任何专利“OWNED_BY“的公司机构名单？
cypher:
MATCH (o:Organization)
WHERE o.entity_type = 'company'
  AND NOT EXISTS { MATCH (:Patent)-[:OWNED_BY]->(o) }
RETURN o.name AS org_name
ORDER BY org_name
LIMIT 30

question: 统计一下：在中国（CN）公开的专利里，有多少没有任何IPC分类？
给我看看哪些专利完全不属于任何专利族（PatentFamily）。
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)
WHERE NOT (p)-[:IN_FAMILY]->(:PatentFamily)
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title AS title
ORDER BY p.application_no
LIMIT 20

question: 有哪些专利发生了转让（TRANSFERRED_TO）但缺少转让来源方（TRANSFERRED_FROM）记录？
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(:Organization)
WHERE NOT EXISTS { MATCH (p)-[:TRANSFERRED_FROM]->(:Organization) }
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title AS title
LIMIT 20

question: 是否存在：已经标注了诉讼类型但没有任何对方当事人（LITIGATED_WITH）的专利？列出来。
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:HAS_LITIGATION_TYPE]->(:LitigationType)
WHERE NOT EXISTS { MATCH (p)-[:LITIGATED_WITH]->(:Organization) }
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title AS title
LIMIT 20

question: 统计：法律状态为“授权“的专利中，有多少没有任何权利人（OWNED_BY）记录？
哪些人员已经关联了机构（AFFILIATED_WITH），但该机构没有任何所在地（LOCATED_IN）信息？
cypher:
MATCH (per:Person)-[:AFFILIATED_WITH]->(o:Organization)
WHERE NOT EXISTS { MATCH (o)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(:Location) }
RETURN per.name AS person_name, o.name AS org_name
ORDER BY org_name, person_name
LIMIT 30

question: 在“储氢技术“领域中，哪些专利摘要为空且同时也没有IPC分类？
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(:TechDomain {name:'储氢技术'})
WHERE (p.abstract IS NULL OR trim(p.abstract) = '')
  AND NOT EXISTS { MATCH (p)-[:CLASSIFIED_AS]->(:IPCCode) }
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title AS title
ORDER BY p.application_no
LIMIT 20

question: 哪些机构当过被许可方（LICENSED_TO）但从未作为许可方（LICENSED_FROM）出现过？
列出同时发生过许可（LICENSED_TO）和质押（PLEDGED_TO）的专利。
哪些专利既发生过转让（TRANSFERRED_TO）又卷入过诉讼（LITIGATED_WITH）？
有没有专利的申请人（APPLIED_BY）和权利人（OWNED_BY）不是同一家机构？给我举例。
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(a:Organization), (p)-[:OWNED_BY]->(o:Organization)
WHERE a <> o
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title AS title, a.name AS applicant, o.name AS owner
ORDER BY p.application_no
LIMIT 20

question: 帮我列出存在完整转让链条（TRANSFERRED_FROM 与 TRANSFERRED_TO 同时存在）的专利，并显示转出/转入双方。
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:TRANSFERRED_FROM]->(from:Organization), (p)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(to:Organization)
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title AS title, from.name AS transferred_from, to.name AS transferred_to
ORDER BY p.application_no
LIMIT 30

question: 哪些专利同时存在许可方（LICENSED_FROM）和被许可方（LICENSED_TO）记录？
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:LICENSED_FROM]->(licensor:Organization), (p)-[:LICENSED_TO]->(licensee:Organization)
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title AS title, licensor.name AS licensor, licensee.name AS licensee
ORDER BY p.application_no
LIMIT 30

question: 诉讼类型为“侵权诉讼“的专利中，哪些还发生过转让（TRANSFERRED_TO）？
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:HAS_LITIGATION_TYPE]->(:LitigationType {name:'侵权诉讼'})
WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (p)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(:Organization) }
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title AS title
LIMIT 20

question: 能否列出同时被质押（PLEDGED_TO）且发生诉讼（LITIGATED_WITH）的专利？
有哪些专利把同一家机构既作为转入方（TRANSFERRED_TO）又作为被许可方（LICENSED_TO）？
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(o:Organization)
WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (p)-[:LICENSED_TO]->(o) }
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title AS title, o.name AS org
ORDER BY p.application_no
LIMIT 20

question: 哪些专利同时与至少两家不同机构发生过诉讼关系（LITIGATED_WITH）？请返回对方机构列表。
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:LITIGATED_WITH]->(o:Organization)
WITH p, collect(DISTINCT o.name) AS opponents
WHERE size(opponents) >= 2
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title AS title, opponents
ORDER BY size(opponents) DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 筛选出申请年份为2022且同时发生过质押（PLEDGED_TO）与转让（TRANSFERRED_TO）的专利。
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)
WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) = '2022'
  AND EXISTS { MATCH (p)-[:PLEDGED_TO]->(:Organization) }
  AND EXISTS { MATCH (p)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(:Organization) }
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title AS title
ORDER BY p.application_no
LIMIT 20

question: 哪些专利族同时在CN和US都有公开成员？请按专利族规模排序。
cypher:
MATCH (f:PatentFamily)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(c:Country)
WITH f, collect(DISTINCT c.code) AS countries, count(DISTINCT p) AS family_size
WHERE 'CN' IN countries AND 'US' IN countries
RETURN f.family_id AS family_id, family_size, countries
ORDER BY family_size DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 有没有那种“整个专利族的所有成员“法律状态都为授权的专利族？列出专利族ID和成员数。
cypher:
MATCH (f:PatentFamily)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(p:Patent)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(ls:LegalStatus)
WITH f, collect(COALESCE(ls.name,'无')) AS statuses, count(DISTINCT p) AS n
WHERE n > 0 AND all(s IN statuses WHERE s = '授权')
RETURN f.family_id AS family_id, n AS family_size
ORDER BY family_size DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 找出至少有一个成员涉及诉讼（LITIGATED_WITH）的专利族。
cypher:
MATCH (f:PatentFamily)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(p:Patent)
WITH f, collect(DISTINCT p) AS ps
WHERE any(x IN ps WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (x)-[:LITIGATED_WITH]->(:Organization) })
RETURN f.family_id AS family_id, size(ps) AS family_size
ORDER BY family_size DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 哪些专利族至少有2件成员专利的IPC前缀属于H01M？
cypher:
MATCH (f:PatentFamily)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(p:Patent)-[:CLASSIFIED_AS]->(ipc:IPCCode)
WHERE ipc.code STARTS WITH 'H01M'
WITH f, count(DISTINCT p) AS h01m_cnt
WHERE h01m_cnt >= 2
RETURN f.family_id AS family_id, h01m_cnt
ORDER BY h01m_cnt DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 以“国家电投氢能科技有限公司“为例，它拥有（OWNED_BY）的专利主要集中在哪些专利族？给出TOP15。
cypher:
MATCH (o:Organization {name:'国家电投氢能科技有限公司'})<-[:OWNED_BY]-(p:Patent)-[:IN_FAMILY]->(f:PatentFamily)
WITH f, count(DISTINCT p) AS owned_cnt
RETURN f.family_id AS family_id, owned_cnt
ORDER BY owned_cnt DESC
LIMIT 15

question: 哪些专利族的成员跨越了不止一个技术领域（BELONGS_TO）？请把领域列表也返回。
cypher:
MATCH (f:PatentFamily)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(p:Patent)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(d:TechDomain)
WITH f, collect(DISTINCT d.name) AS domains, count(DISTINCT p) AS n
WHERE size(domains) > 1
RETURN f.family_id AS family_id, n AS family_size, domains
ORDER BY family_size DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 有没有专利族满足：族内至少一件专利发生过转让（TRANSFERRED_TO），并且族内至少一件专利发生过许可（LICENSED_TO）？
cypher:
MATCH (f:PatentFamily)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(p:Patent)
WITH f, collect(DISTINCT p) AS ps
WHERE any(x IN ps WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (x)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(:Organization) })
  AND any(x IN ps WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (x)-[:LICENSED_TO]->(:Organization) })
RETURN f.family_id AS family_id, size(ps) AS family_size
ORDER BY family_size DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 哪些专利族包含日本（JP）公开成员，但完全没有中国（CN）公开成员？
cypher:
MATCH (f:PatentFamily)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(c:Country)
WITH f, collect(DISTINCT c.code) AS countries
WHERE 'JP' IN countries AND NOT ('CN' IN countries)
RETURN f.family_id AS family_id, countries
ORDER BY f.family_id
LIMIT 20

question: 列出“在美国（US）公开但申请机构在中国境内“的专利，顺便返回机构省市。
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(:Country {code:'US'})
MATCH (p)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location)
WHERE loc.country = '中国'
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title AS title, o.name AS applicant, loc.province AS province, loc.city AS city
ORDER BY p.application_no
LIMIT 20

question: 有哪些在中国（CN）公开的专利，其申请机构所在地国家却是德国？
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(:Country {code:'CN'})
MATCH (p)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location)
WHERE loc.country = '德国'
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title AS title, o.name AS applicant, loc.name AS location_name
LIMIT 20

question: 请统计名称包含“氢枫“的机构中，公开国家与机构所在国家不一致的专利数量。
cypher:
MATCH (o:Organization)
WHERE o.name CONTAINS '氢枫'
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location)
MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(c:Country)
WHERE loc.country IS NOT NULL AND c.name <> loc.country
RETURN o.name AS org, count(DISTINCT p) AS mismatch_cnt
ORDER BY mismatch_cnt DESC
LIMIT 10

question: 哪些位于上海的机构申请了在日本（JP）公开的专利？按数量降序返回TOP20。
cypher:
MATCH (o:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location)
WHERE loc.province = '上海市'
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o)
MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(:Country {code:'JP'})
RETURN o.name AS org, count(DISTINCT p) AS jp_cnt
ORDER BY jp_cnt DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 列出在欧洲专利局（EP）公开、且权利人位于北京的专利。
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(:Country {code:'EP'})
MATCH (p)-[:OWNED_BY]->(o:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location)
WHERE loc.province = '北京市'
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title AS title, o.name AS owner
LIMIT 20

question: 统计：已经授权（HAS_STATUS=授权）的专利中，有多少是在境外（非CN）公开的？按公开国家排序。
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(:LegalStatus {name:'授权'})
MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(c:Country)
WHERE c.code <> 'CN'
RETURN c.code AS country, count(DISTINCT p) AS authorized_abroad
ORDER BY authorized_abroad DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 广东省申请机构的专利里，在美国（US）公开的数量主要集中在哪些城市？
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(:Country {code:'US'})
MATCH (p)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location)
WHERE loc.province = '广东省'
RETURN loc.city AS city, count(DISTINCT p) AS us_cnt
ORDER BY us_cnt DESC
LIMIT 15

question: 有没有在中国（CN）公开但转让给境外机构（TRANSFERRED_TO所在地国家≠中国）的专利？列出部分样例。
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(:Country {code:'CN'})
MATCH (p)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(o:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location)
WHERE loc.country <> '中国'
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title AS title, o.name AS transferred_to, loc.country AS org_country
LIMIT 20

question: 统计：2020年申请、且属于“物理储氢“的授权专利数量是多少？
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(:TechDomain {name:'物理储氢'})
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(:LegalStatus {name:'授权'})
WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) = '2020'
RETURN count(DISTINCT p) AS cnt

question: 哪些被驳回（驳回）但仍然发生过转让（TRANSFERRED_TO）的专利？
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(:LegalStatus {name:'驳回'})
WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (p)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(:Organization) }
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title AS title
ORDER BY p.application_no
LIMIT 20

question: 在“氢燃料电池“领域里，按机构统计授权专利（以OWNED_BY为准）最多的是哪些？
cypher:
MATCH (o:Organization)<-[:OWNED_BY]-(p:Patent)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(:TechDomain {name:'氢燃料电池'})
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(:LegalStatus {name:'授权'})
RETURN o.name AS org, count(DISTINCT p) AS authorized_cnt
ORDER BY authorized_cnt DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 请列出：处于“实质审查“状态且IPC以H01M开头的专利。
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(:LegalStatus {name:'实质审查'})
MATCH (p)-[:CLASSIFIED_AS]->(ipc:IPCCode)
WHERE ipc.code STARTS WITH 'H01M'
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title AS title, ipc.code AS ipc
ORDER BY p.application_no
LIMIT 20

question: 江苏省机构中，各机构的授权与驳回专利分别有多少？请一起返回对比。
cypher:
MATCH (o:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location)
WHERE loc.province = '江苏省'
OPTIONAL MATCH (p1:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(:LegalStatus {name:'授权'})
OPTIONAL MATCH (p2:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(:LegalStatus {name:'驳回'})
RETURN o.name AS org, count(DISTINCT p1) AS authorized, count(DISTINCT p2) AS rejected
ORDER BY authorized DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 哪些专利已经撤回（撤回）但仍有诉讼关联（LITIGATED_WITH）？
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(:LegalStatus {name:'撤回'})
WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (p)-[:LITIGATED_WITH]->(:Organization) }
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title AS title
LIMIT 20

question: 能否找出已授权但不属于任何专利族（IN_FAMILY缺失）的专利？
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(:LegalStatus {name:'授权'})
WHERE NOT (p)-[:IN_FAMILY]->(:PatentFamily)
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title AS title
ORDER BY p.application_no
LIMIT 20

question: 给我看看在美国（US）公开且法律状态为“授权“的专利（含申请年份）。
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(:Country {code:'US'})
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(:LegalStatus {name:'授权'})
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title AS title, substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year
ORDER BY year DESC, application_no
LIMIT 30

question: 是否存在同一件专利对应多个不同法律状态（HAS_STATUS）记录的情况？列出专利及状态列表。
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(ls:LegalStatus)
WITH p, collect(DISTINCT ls.name) AS statuses
WHERE size(statuses) > 1
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title AS title, statuses
ORDER BY size(statuses) DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 列出：由高校申请、已授权且发生过诉讼（LITIGATED_WITH）的专利样例。
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(u:Organization {entity_type:'university'})
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(:LegalStatus {name:'授权'})
MATCH (p)-[:LITIGATED_WITH]->(opp:Organization)
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title AS title, u.name AS university, opp.name AS opponent
ORDER BY p.application_no
LIMIT 20

question: 列出IPC以H01M开头且属于“氢燃料电池“领域的专利（含年份与IPC）。
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:CLASSIFIED_AS]->(ipc:IPCCode)
WHERE ipc.code STARTS WITH 'H01M'
MATCH (p)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(:TechDomain {name:'氢燃料电池'})
RETURN p.title AS title, p.application_no AS application_no, substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year, ipc.code AS ipc
ORDER BY year DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 统计：IPC前缀为C01B且法律状态为授权的专利数量。
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:CLASSIFIED_AS]->(ipc:IPCCode)
WHERE ipc.code STARTS WITH 'C01B'
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(:LegalStatus {name:'授权'})
RETURN count(DISTINCT p) AS cnt

question: 按申请机构统计：IPC以F17C开头（常见储运相关）的专利最多的机构有哪些？同时返回机构省份。
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:CLASSIFIED_AS]->(ipc:IPCCode)
WHERE ipc.code STARTS WITH 'F17C'
MATCH (p)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location)
RETURN o.name AS org, loc.province AS province, count(DISTINCT p) AS cnt
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 哪些IPC以H01M10开头的专利是在日本（JP）公开的？
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:CLASSIFIED_AS]->(ipc:IPCCode)
WHERE ipc.code STARTS WITH 'H01M10'
MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(:Country {code:'JP'})
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title AS title, ipc.code AS ipc
ORDER BY p.application_no
LIMIT 20

question: 能否找出同时被IPC归类到H01M与F17C两类（前缀匹配）的专利？
在“氢燃料电池“领域里，哪些专利没有任何H01M前缀的IPC分类？
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(:TechDomain {name:'氢燃料电池'})
WHERE NOT EXISTS { MATCH (p)-[:CLASSIFIED_AS]->(ipc:IPCCode) WHERE ipc.code STARTS WITH 'H01M' }
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title AS title
ORDER BY p.application_no
LIMIT 20

question: 涉诉专利中，最常出现的IPC分类有哪些？返回TOP15。
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:LITIGATED_WITH]->(:Organization)
MATCH (p)-[:CLASSIFIED_AS]->(ipc:IPCCode)
RETURN ipc.code AS ipc, count(DISTINCT p) AS litigated_patents
ORDER BY litigated_patents DESC
LIMIT 15

question: 按申请年份统计：属于“制氢技术“且IPC前缀为C25B（常见电解相关）的专利数量走势。
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(:TechDomain {name:'制氢技术'})
MATCH (p)-[:CLASSIFIED_AS]->(ipc:IPCCode)
WHERE ipc.code STARTS WITH 'C25B'
WITH substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year, count(DISTINCT p) AS cnt
RETURN year, cnt
ORDER BY year DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 对比北京与上海：申请专利的授权率分别是多少？（授权数/总数）
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location)
WHERE loc.province IN ['北京市','上海市']
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(ls:LegalStatus)
WITH loc.province AS province,
     count(DISTINCT p) AS total,
     count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ls.name = '授权' THEN p END) AS authorized
RETURN province, total, authorized,
       CASE WHEN total = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE toFloat(authorized) / total END AS auth_rate
ORDER BY auth_rate DESC

question: 对比“东方电气集团有限公司“和“上海氢枫能源技术有限公司“：各自申请专利中境外公开（非CN）占比是多少？
cypher:
MATCH (o:Organization)
WHERE o.name IN ['东方电气集团有限公司','上海氢枫能源技术有限公司']
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o)
MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(c:Country)
WITH o.name AS org,
     count(DISTINCT p) AS total,
     count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.code <> 'CN' THEN p END) AS abroad
RETURN org, total, abroad,
       CASE WHEN total = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE toFloat(abroad) / total END AS abroad_share
ORDER BY abroad_share DESC

question: 按二级技术域（若有父域则取父域，否则取自身）统计授权率，并按授权率从高到低排序。
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(d:TechDomain)
OPTIONAL MATCH (d)-[:PARENT_DOMAIN]->(parent:TechDomain)
WITH p, coalesce(parent, d) AS lvl2
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(ls:LegalStatus)
WITH lvl2.name AS domain,
     count(DISTINCT p) AS total,
     count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ls.name = '授权' THEN p END) AS authorized
RETURN domain, total, authorized,
       CASE WHEN total = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE toFloat(authorized) / total END AS auth_rate
ORDER BY auth_rate DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 按年份对比：在“氢燃料电池“领域中，涉诉专利占比（涉诉/总量）是多少？
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(:TechDomain {name:'氢燃料电池'})
WITH substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year, collect(DISTINCT p) AS ps
WITH year,
     size(ps) AS total,
     size([x IN ps WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (x)-[:LITIGATED_WITH]->(:Organization) }]) AS litigated
RETURN year, total, litigated,
       CASE WHEN total = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE toFloat(litigated) / total END AS litigation_rate
ORDER BY year DESC
LIMIT 15

question: 对比CN与US：只要专利族中存在该国公开成员，就计入该国；分别给出专利族平均规模（平均成员数）。
cypher:
MATCH (f:PatentFamily)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(p:Patent)
WITH f, collect(DISTINCT p) AS members
WITH f, size(members) AS family_size
UNWIND ['CN','US'] AS code
WITH code, f, family_size
WHERE EXISTS {
  MATCH (f)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(:Country {code: code})
}
RETURN code AS country, avg(family_size) AS avg_family_size, count(DISTINCT f) AS families
ORDER BY country

question: 对名称包含“中国石化“的机构，比较其作为受让方（TRANSFERRED_TO）与作为被许可方（LICENSED_TO）的数量，并给出转让/许可比值。
cypher:
MATCH (o:Organization)
WHERE o.name CONTAINS '中国石化'
OPTIONAL MATCH (p1:Patent)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(o)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p2:Patent)-[:LICENSED_TO]->(o)
WITH o, count(DISTINCT p1) AS transferred_in, count(DISTINCT p2) AS licensed_in
RETURN o.name AS org, transferred_in, licensed_in,
       CASE WHEN licensed_in = 0 THEN null ELSE toFloat(transferred_in) / licensed_in END AS transfer_to_license_ratio
ORDER BY transfer_to_license_ratio DESC
LIMIT 5

question: 对比深圳与苏州：各自申请专利的质押率（发生PLEDGED_TO的专利数/总专利数）是多少？
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location)
WHERE loc.city IN ['深圳市','苏州市']
WITH loc.city AS city, collect(DISTINCT p) AS ps
WITH city,
     size(ps) AS total,
     size([x IN ps WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (x)-[:PLEDGED_TO]->(:Organization) }]) AS pledged
RETURN city, total, pledged,
       CASE WHEN total = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE toFloat(pledged) / total END AS pledge_rate
ORDER BY pledge_rate DESC

question: 在2021年申请的专利中，对比清华大学与浙江大学：H01M类IPC专利占比各是多少？
cypher:
MATCH (o:Organization)
WHERE o.name IN ['清华大学','浙江大学']
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o)
WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) = '2021'
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:CLASSIFIED_AS]->(ipc:IPCCode)
WITH o.name AS org,
     count(DISTINCT p) AS total,
     count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ipc.code STARTS WITH 'H01M' THEN p END) AS h01m
RETURN org, total, h01m,
       CASE WHEN total = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE toFloat(h01m) / total END AS h01m_share
ORDER BY h01m_share DESC

question: 给我汇总中国科学院大连化学物理研究所申请的专利：可选返回法律状态、专利族、公开国家、IPC列表，以及是否涉诉与对方机构。
cypher:
MATCH (o:Organization {name:'中国科学院大连化学物理研究所'})
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(ls:LegalStatus)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:IN_FAMILY]->(f:PatentFamily)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(c:Country)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:CLASSIFIED_AS]->(ipc:IPCCode)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:LITIGATED_WITH]->(opp:Organization)
WITH p,
     coalesce(ls.name,'未知') AS status,
     coalesce(f.family_id,'无') AS family_id,
     coalesce(c.code,'未知') AS pub_country,
     collect(DISTINCT ipc.code) AS ipcs,
     collect(DISTINCT opp.name) AS opponents
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no,
       p.title AS title,
       status,
       family_id,
       pub_country,
       ipcs,
       CASE WHEN size(opponents) = 0 THEN '否' ELSE '是' END AS has_litigation,
       opponents
ORDER BY p.application_date DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 列出部分公司机构（名称含“氢“或“能源“）：同时给出省份（如有）、拥有专利数、被许可进入数、被质押进入数。
cypher:
MATCH (o:Organization)
WHERE o.entity_type = 'company' AND (o.name CONTAINS '氢' OR o.name CONTAINS '能源')
OPTIONAL MATCH (o)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location)
OPTIONAL MATCH (pOwn:Patent)-[:OWNED_BY]->(o)
OPTIONAL MATCH (pLic:Patent)-[:LICENSED_TO]->(o)
OPTIONAL MATCH (pPlg:Patent)-[:PLEDGED_TO]->(o)
WITH o, coalesce(loc.province,'未知') AS province,
     count(DISTINCT pOwn) AS owned_cnt,
     count(DISTINCT pLic) AS licensed_in_cnt,
     count(DISTINCT pPlg) AS pledged_in_cnt
RETURN o.name AS org, province, owned_cnt, licensed_in_cnt, pledged_in_cnt
ORDER BY owned_cnt DESC
LIMIT 25

question: 列出“合金储氢“领域的专利，并尽可能补全其转让转出方/转入方（没有则显示未记录）。
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(:TechDomain {name:'合金储氢'})
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:TRANSFERRED_FROM]->(from:Organization)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(to:Organization)
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no,
       p.title AS title,
       substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year,
       coalesce(from.name,'未记录') AS transferred_from,
       coalesce(to.name,'未记录') AS transferred_to
ORDER BY year DESC, application_no
LIMIT 30

question: 给我一份涉诉专利清单：包含诉讼类型（如有）、法律状态（如有）、公开国家（如有）、对方机构及其role属性。
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[lw:LITIGATED_WITH]->(o:Organization)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:HAS_LITIGATION_TYPE]->(lt:LitigationType)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(ls:LegalStatus)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(c:Country)
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no,
       p.title AS title,
       coalesce(lt.name,'未知') AS litigation_type,
       coalesce(ls.name,'未知') AS status,
       coalesce(c.code,'未知') AS pub_country,
       o.name AS counterpart,
       coalesce(lw.role,'未知') AS role
ORDER BY p.application_date DESC
LIMIT 25

question: 列出专利族概览：专利族规模、一个示例标题、以及成员公开国家列表（如果没有成员也要能返回）。
cypher:
MATCH (f:PatentFamily)
OPTIONAL MATCH (f)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(p:Patent)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(c:Country)
WITH f,
     collect(DISTINCT p.title) AS titles,
     collect(DISTINCT c.code) AS countries,
     count(DISTINCT p) AS n
RETURN f.family_id AS family_id,
       n AS family_size,
       CASE WHEN size(titles) = 0 THEN '无成员' ELSE titles[0] END AS sample_title,
       countries
ORDER BY family_size DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 列出人员-机构-省份的名录，并补充该机构申请的专利数量（没有地点也要显示未知）。
cypher:
MATCH (per:Person)-[:AFFILIATED_WITH]->(o:Organization)
OPTIONAL MATCH (o)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location)
OPTIONAL MATCH (pat:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o)
WITH per, o, coalesce(loc.province,'未知') AS province, count(DISTINCT pat) AS applied_cnt
RETURN per.name AS person, o.name AS org, province, applied_cnt
ORDER BY applied_cnt DESC, org
LIMIT 30

question: 给我看看2019年在CN公开的专利：可选返回技术领域、IPC列表、法律状态列表。
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(:Country {code:'CN'})
WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) = '2019'
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(d:TechDomain)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:CLASSIFIED_AS]->(ipc:IPCCode)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(ls:LegalStatus)
WITH p,
     collect(DISTINCT d.name) AS domains,
     collect(DISTINCT ipc.code) AS ipcs,
     collect(DISTINCT ls.name) AS statuses
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no,
       p.title AS title,
       domains,
       ipcs,
       CASE WHEN size(statuses) = 0 THEN ['未知'] ELSE statuses END AS statuses
ORDER BY p.application_no
LIMIT 30

question: 列出被“亿华通“作为被许可方（LICENSED_TO）的专利，并可选补全是否同时被质押或转让给其他机构。
cypher:
MATCH (o:Organization)
WHERE o.name CONTAINS '亿华通'
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:LICENSED_TO]->(o)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:PLEDGED_TO]->(plg:Organization)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(tr:Organization)
WITH p, o, collect(DISTINCT plg.name) AS pledged_to, collect(DISTINCT tr.name) AS transferred_to
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no,
       p.title AS title,
       o.name AS licensee,
       pledged_to,
       transferred_to
ORDER BY p.application_date DESC
LIMIT 20
